But the Ibun’s cock did not enter Lisa’s vagina.

To be precise, it was inserted — but only about one-fifth of its full length.

The Ibun didn’t understand why.

Its cock was certainly larger than that of an average human, so under normal circumstances it shouldn’t have fit inside Lisa at all. However, because the Ibun had made her produce plenty of love juices and was using them as lubricant, it had managed to push in a little. That was why its cock was currently inside her, albeit only slightly.

The problem was that it wouldn’t go any deeper.

No matter how many times the Ibun tried to thrust further in, it was as if it kept hitting an invisible wall. The cock simply refused to advance past a certain point.

(Th-the defensive barrier magic… seems to be working…)

Even with her consciousness growing hazy, Lisa felt a small sense of relief knowing that the defensive barrier magic she had cast was still functioning properly.

Lisa had never had sex with anyone in her life.

In other words, she was still a virgin.

She absolutely refused to let her first time be with an Ibun, so from the moment she was restrained, she had kept a defensive barrier magic active around her vaginal entrance.

As long as that magic remained, even the Ibun’s powerful cock could not invade any further.

Unless it delivered a strong enough impact or used opposing magic, the barrier could not be broken.

And within the limited space of her vagina, the Ibun’s cock was incapable of generating enough force to shatter the spell. Moreover, Ibuns didn’t even possess the intelligence to use counter-magic.

Thanks to this defensive barrier, Lisa’s virginity was protected.

While Lisa could use magic, she wasn’t particularly skilled at it, so this was the best she could manage right now. Having poured most of her strength into maintaining the barrier, she no longer had enough power left for any other spells.

On top of that, after being continuously groped and toyed with by the Ibuns all over her body, she was already nearing her physical limit.

The only things she could do now were endure the pleasure coursing through her body and pray that the Ibuns would eventually leave.

(Once they realize they can’t have sex, they’ll probably leave soon…)

Even though Ibuns were extremely lustful, their ultimate goal was their own pleasure — specifically, ejaculation.

Among their preferences, inserting their cock into a female’s vagina and cumming inside was still their favorite.

If they couldn’t do that, they might lose interest and leave. Even if not, they would probably just masturbate and finish themselves off. That was what Lisa was hoping for.

She watched the Ibun that still had its cock inside her motionless vagina. Then, suddenly, the Ibun pulled its cock completely out.

(Yes! Now it’s over—)

The moment she thought the cock had been withdrawn, the Ibun immediately pressed its cock against her pussy again.

(Hey, wait! Even if you do that… it won’t… mean anything…!)

Even though only about a fifth of its length could enter, the Ibun didn’t stop pistoning its cock against her pussy.

It couldn’t send its semen deep into her vagina this way, but the Ibun was clearly enjoying itself nonetheless. Even with only a few centimeters of movement, Lisa’s tight entrance was stimulating the head and ridge of its cock perfectly.

(Why… something like this… Nooo!!)

This was completely unexpected for Lisa, and she desperately fought against the rapidly building pleasure.

She had made two mistakes at this moment.

The first was the placement of her defensive barrier magic. Because she had cast it in a hurry, the barrier was positioned slightly deeper inside her vagina. As a result, the Ibun was freely using the entrance of her pussy like an onahole.

The second mistake was that because the insertion depth was shallower than normal, the Ibun’s pistoning movements became faster and shorter. This caused its cock to repeatedly strike her clitoris and G-spot with intense frequency.

“No! Stop…! A-Aaahn!!”

The thick, hard cock mercilessly stimulated Lisa’s sensitive, untouched clitoris and her immature G-spot, giving her a level of pleasure she had never experienced before.

Naturally, the other Ibuns were also rubbing their cocks against her body to satisfy their own desires. Some used her hands, others used her feet.

And the one restraining her legs from behind pushed its cock into her other hole.

A sudden pressure assaulted her anus. Something that definitely wasn’t waste was pushing inside.

The foreign object, which normally wouldn’t enter smoothly, slid in easily thanks to the love juices dripping from her pussy and the Ibun’s own precum.

Since Lisa hadn’t cast her defensive barrier on her anus, the Ibun’s cock pushed deeper and deeper inside.

She screamed desperately, but the anal pistoning had already begun. At that moment, combined with the constant stimulation at the entrance of her pussy, Lisa reached her second orgasm.

“I already came! I came, so stop!!”

Even though she cried out for them to stop, the Ibuns’ torment didn’t cease. Instead, each Ibun began moving faster and harder in pursuit of their own climax.

Naturally, all of their actions reflected back onto Lisa. Even though she had just climaxed, another massive wave of pleasure was already approaching.

“I’m cumming, I’m cumming, I’m cumming, I’m cummiiing!!”

In sync with Lisa’s third orgasm, the Ibun that had been pistoning against her pussy came first.

Slightly afterward, the ones using her hands and feet also ejaculated.

Then, just as the waves of her climax were beginning to recede, she felt a hot liquid sensation deep in her anus.

When each cock was finally pulled out, white semen dripped from every hole. Especially from her pussy — since the ejaculation had happened shallowly, white cum was splattered all over her crotch.

Having finished ejaculating, the Ibuns seemed satisfied and finally released their hold on Lisa.

One by one, they left the area.

However, the Ibun that had taken the explosive earlier remained. It was still lying weakly on the ground. While staring at Lisa, whose panties were still exposed, it stroked its own cock and sprayed two more loads of semen onto her limp body before finally leaving.

After that, Lisa lost consciousness following her third orgasm.

When she finally woke up, the surroundings were dyed in the colors of dusk. Overwhelmed by a terrible stench, she quickly fled the area.
